race.comment: KATOTO (13) nice filly who lived up to her breeding on debut with an eye catching second over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Ready for the extra trip and ticks a few boxes from the good gate. Can put these away. ROLLING HOME (5) has showed a ton of grit in his two career starts and backs up quickly after savaging the line when third over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Capable of overcoming the wide gate third-up with the key jockey change. LAFITE (16) slow into stride on debut with a struggling sixth over 1200m at Warwick Farm. Expecting a sharp form reversal over the extra trip. UNHINGED (9) two-year-old Snitzel colt out of Tints. Closely related to Group 1 winning mare Hinged. Given time to develop and kicks off in a winnable race. The chances don't end there.
